prompt: Snap all architectural lines to this grid for perfect perspective.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Adjust the architectural lines of the room, including the walls, floor, ceiling, bed, and dresser, to precisely align with the three-point perspective and grid of image 2. Ensure all structural elements in image 1 conform to the perfect perspective established by image 2's grid, using it as the reference for vanishing points and orthogonality.
